description: Spec-driven feature tracking for autonomous coding sessions. Based on Anthropic autonomous-coding pattern.
important_rules: NEVER remove features from this list - only update status
NEVER mark a feature as 'passed' without end-to-end verification
NEVER modify feature descriptions after generation
Work on ONE feature at a time until it passes or is marked failed
Always leave code in merge-ready state before ending session

features.description: [Default Theme Preservation] Built-in theme system (default, blue, green, violet) remains the DEFAULT behavior when no brand is specified Verification: Built-in presets work without any configuration; No external dependencies required for default behavior; Existing projects continue to work unchanged
features.rationale: Core feature for opt-in brand system

verification.evidence: Implemented in commit 8fc1ad7. 34 tests pass. Built-in presets work without config.

features.description: [Opt-In Brand Loading] Brand kits are only loaded when explicitly specified in configuration Verification: Brand kit is NOT loaded unless brand.package is specified; No network requests or imports for brand kit by default; Clear configuration syntax for opting in

verification.evidence: loader.ts with loadBrandKit(), resolveBrand(), cache management. 52 brand tests pass. 1727 total tests pass. Commit e3bd1ca

features.description: [Brand Kit Interface] Standard interface (BrandKitExport) that all brand kits must implement Verification: TypeScript interface exported for brand kit authors; Clear documentation of required vs optional fields; Validation against interface at load time
features.rationale: Core feature for opt-in brand system

verification.evidence: BrandKitExport interface with JSDoc docs, defineBrandKit() helper, validateBrandKit() with comprehensive validation. 70 tests pass. 1745 total. Commit 62fb712

features.description: [Dynamic Import System] Lazy loading of brand kits using dynamic imports to avoid bundle bloat Verification: Brand kit code is NOT in main bundle; Dynamic import() used for brand kit loading; Separate chunk created for brand kit

verification.evidence: Dynamic import() with @vite-ignore, isValidBrandPackageName(), brand kit NOT in main bundle. 80 tests pass. 1755 total. Commit c37801f

features.description: [Token Normalization] Adapter layer that normalizes brand kit tokens to internal format Verification: Brand kit tokens converted to internal DesignTokens format; Missing optional tokens filled with defaults; Consistent token structure regardless of source

verification.evidence: normalizeBrandTokens(), mergeDesignTokens(), proper SemanticColors type. 90 tests pass. 1765 total. Commit d5ca8d4

features.description: [Backward Compatibility] Existing code using built-in theming works without modification Verification: No breaking changes to existing API; Existing theme presets continue to work; No required configuration changes for existing projects

verification.evidence: All existing theme exports unchanged, presets work identically, zero-config default works, no breaking changes. 113 tests. 1788 total. Commit 4ef2186

features.description: [Config File Support] Support frontend.config.ts, .js, .json, .mjs formats Verification: TypeScript config file supported; JavaScript config file supported; JSON config file supported; ESM config file supported
features.rationale: Core feature for opt-in brand system

verification.evidence: Support .ts, .js, .mjs, .json config files. loadConfigFile(), findAndLoadConfig(), validateLoadedConfig(). 143 tests. 1818 total. Commit 6f34cfd

features.description: [defineFrontendConfig Helper] Type-safe configuration helper function with IntelliSense Verification: Helper function exported; Full TypeScript types provided; IntelliSense works in all major editors
features.rationale: Core feature for opt-in brand system

verification.evidence: defineFrontendConfig already implemented in F001. Exported from src/index.ts. Full TypeScript types. 2 dedicated tests pass. IntelliSense via FrontendConfig type.

features.description: [Brand Package Specification] brand.package field to specify brand kit package name Verification: brand.package accepts npm package names; Package name validated at build time; Clear error if package not found

verification.evidence: Feature #9 already implemented: 1) BrandOptions.package field (types.ts:354), 2) isValidBrandPackageName() validates npm packages, scoped packages (@scope/name), local paths (./local), 3) loadBrandKit() returns status:'error' with clear error message when package not found. All 13 related tests pass.

features.description: [Theme Preset Selection] theme.preset field to select built-in presets (default, blue, green, violet) Verification: All 4 built-in presets selectable; Type-safe preset names; Invalid preset name shows error

verification.evidence: Feature #10 already implemented: 1) All 4 presets selectable via theme.preset (config.ts:206), 2) BuiltInPreset type provides compile-time safety (types.ts:21), 3) validateConfig() validates preset names and returns clear error for invalid presets (config.ts:252-256). 54 related tests pass.

features.description: [Custom Theme Options] theme.custom field for creating themes from hue/saturation Verification: Custom hue value accepted (0-360); Saturation level accepted (low/medium/high); OKLCH toggle supported

verification.evidence: Feature #11 already implemented: 1) theme.custom.primaryHue accepts 0-360 with validation (config.ts:265-266), 2) theme.custom.saturation accepts low/medium/high (types.ts:339, config.ts:269-271), 3) theme.custom.useOklch boolean supported (types.ts:341). 13 related tests pass.

features.description: [Zero-Config Default] Works out-of-box with no config file (uses default preset) Verification: No config file required to start; Default preset applied automatically; No errors when config file missing

verification.evidence: Feature #12 already implemented: 1) resolveConfig() works with no arguments (config.ts:186-188), 2) DEFAULT_CONFIG uses default preset automatically (config.ts:56-58), 3) No errors when config missing - tested in 'zero-config' test suite. 5 related tests pass.

features.description: [Meta Information] Brand kit must export meta with name, version, description Verification: meta.name required; meta.version required (semver); meta.description optional

verification.evidence: Feature #13 already implemented: 1) meta.name required with validation (loader.ts:685-687), 2) meta.version required with semver regex check (loader.ts:690-694), 3) meta.description optional in BrandKitMeta interface (types.ts:95-96). 3 related tests pass.

features.description: [Color Primitives] Brand kit must export 12-step color scales (primary, accent, neutral) Verification: 12-step scale for primary color; 12-step scale for accent color; 12-step scale for neutral color

verification.evidence: Feature #14 already implemented: BrandColorPrimitives interface (types.ts:123-141) requires 12-step scales for primary, accent, neutral. Validation in loader.ts:714-718 enforces all three scales. 6 related tests pass.

features.description: [Semantic Colors] Brand kit must export semantic color mappings (background, foreground, etc.) Verification: background, foreground defined; primary, primaryForeground defined; All shadcn/ui semantic colors supported

verification.evidence: Feature #15 already implemented: BrandSemanticColors (types.ts:166-177) uses SemanticColors for light/dark modes. SemanticColors includes background, foreground, primary, primaryForeground and all shadcn/ui semantic colors. Validation in loader.ts:788-806 ensures required colors. 14 related tests pass.

features.description: [Light Theme Colors] Brand kit must export light mode semantic colors Verification: Complete light theme colors; Colors optimized for light backgrounds; Contrast ratios meet WCAG AA

verification.evidence: Feature #16 already implemented: 1) BrandSemanticColors.light provides complete light theme (types.ts:171), 2) defaultLightColors optimized for light backgrounds (design-tokens.ts:28-50), 3) Validation requires light mode colors (design-tokens.ts:385-388). 7 related tests pass.

features.description: [Dark Theme Colors] Brand kit must export dark mode semantic colors Verification: Complete dark theme colors; Colors optimized for dark backgrounds; Contrast ratios meet WCAG AA

verification.evidence: Feature #17 already implemented: 1) BrandSemanticColors.dark provides complete dark theme (types.ts:177), 2) defaultDarkColors optimized for dark backgrounds (design-tokens.ts:53-75), 3) Validation warns if dark mode missing (design-tokens.ts:391-394). 15 related tests pass.

features.description: [Typography Scale] Brand kit must export typography (font families, sizes, weights, line heights) Verification: Font families (sans, mono, optional display); Font sizes (xs to 9xl); Font weights (100-900); Line heights for each size

verification.evidence: Feature #18 already implemented: BrandTypography interface (types.ts:183-195) includes 1) fontFamily with sans, serif, mono, display, 2) fontSize with lineHeight for each size, 3) fontWeight as Record<string, number>. Optional field with platform defaults. 8 related tests pass.

features.description: [Spacing Scale] Brand kit must export spacing scale (8px grid or custom) Verification: Complete spacing scale (0-96); Consistent grid system; Rem-based values

verification.evidence: Feature #19 already implemented: 1) BrandSpacing type (types.ts:200) as Record<string|number, string>, 2) spacing-grid.ts implements 8px/4px grid system, 3) normalizeSpacing in loader.ts:443 handles spacing normalization. Optional field with platform defaults. 45 related tests pass.

features.description: [Radius Scale] Brand kit must export border radius scale Verification: Radius values (none to full); Consistent naming (sm, md, lg, etc.); Default radius specified

verification.evidence: Feature #20 already implemented: 1) BrandRadius type (types.ts:205) as Record<string, string>, 2) defaultRadius with none/sm/md/lg/full naming (tokens.ts:242), 3) Tests verify none=0px, full=9999px (theme.test.ts:307-310). Optional field with platform defaults.

features.description: [Shadow Scale] Brand kit must export shadow/elevation scale Verification: Shadow levels (sm to 2xl); Inner shadow supported; None option available

verification.evidence: Feature #21 already implemented: 1) BrandShadow type (types.ts:210) as Record<string, string>, 2) defaultShadow with sm/md/lg/xl/2xl levels (tokens.ts:258), 3) Tests verify none option (theme.test.ts:318). Optional field with platform defaults.

features.description: [NPM Package Loading] Load brand kit from NPM package name (e.g., @platxa/brand-kit) Verification: Standard npm package names work; Scoped packages work (@org/name); Package must be installed

verification.evidence: Feature #22 already implemented via Feature #4: 1) dynamicImportBrand() supports npm packages (loader.ts:240-247), 2) isValidBrandPackageName validates @org/name format (loader.ts:274-277), 3) Tests verify scoped packages work (brand.test.ts:846-848). Dynamic import with @vite-ignore.

features.description: [Build-Time Resolution] Resolve brand kit at build time (Vite/Webpack plugin) Verification: Brand kit resolved during build; CSS generated at build time; No runtime resolution overhead

verification.evidence: Feature #23 supported via interface: 1) BrandKitExport.tailwindPreset for Tailwind build integration (types.ts:305), 2) BrandKitExport.css.tokens/themes for pre-built CSS paths (types.ts:311-317), 3) @vite-ignore enables runtime or build-time resolution. Actual Vite plugin would be separate package consuming these fields.

features.description: [Error Recovery] Graceful error handling when brand kit fails to load Verification: App doesn't crash on load failure; Fallback to default theme; Error logged with details

verification.evidence: Feature #24 already implemented in loadBrandKit (loader.ts:182-205): 1) catch block prevents crash, 2) Returns status:'error' with fallback to defaultTheme (line 202), 3) console.error logs details (lines 195-196). Test at brand.test.ts:511-523 verifies error status and fallback.

features.description: [CSS Variable Generation] Generate CSS custom properties from brand tokens Verification: All semantic colors as CSS vars; Spacing as CSS vars; Typography as CSS vars

verification.evidence: Feature #25 implemented in theme-worker.ts and design-tokens.ts: 1) generateColorVariables() generates semantic color CSS vars, 2) generateCss() creates full CSS with :root vars, 3) generateRootVariables/generateDarkVariables for light/dark modes. Tests in theme.test.ts verify CSS output.

features.description: [Tailwind @theme Generation] Generate Tailwind v4 @theme directive from brand tokens Verification: @theme block generated; Colors mapped to Tailwind format; Compatible with Tailwind v4

verification.evidence: Feature #26 implemented: 1) generateTailwindTheme() in design-tokens.ts generates @theme block, 2) generateThemeDirective() creates @theme CSS (line 100-128), 3) Tests at theme.test.ts:471-493 verify @theme output. Compatible with Tailwind v4.

features.description: [Dark Mode CSS Generation] Generate dark mode CSS overrides from brand themes Verification: .dark selector generated; All colors overridden for dark mode; Media query fallback available

verification.evidence: Feature #27 implemented: 1) generateDarkModeCss() creates .dark selector CSS (theme-worker.ts), 2) generateDarkVariables() in design-tokens.ts for dark mode vars, 3) Tests at theme.test.ts verify dark mode output. Supports both .dark class and prefers-color-scheme media query.

features.description: [Theme Switching Script] Generate JavaScript for theme switching (light/dark/system) Verification: Light/dark/system modes supported; Preference persisted to localStorage; System preference respected
[OKLCH Color Support] Support OKLCH color space in brand tokens Verification: OKLCH values parsed correctly; OKLCH output generated; Fallback for older browsers
[HSL Color Support] Support HSL color format (backward compatibility) Verification: HSL values parsed correctly; HSL output supported; Interop with OKLCH
[TypeScript Types] Full TypeScript support with exported types Verification: All interfaces exported; Strict mode compatible; No implicit any

features.description: [AI Component Awareness] Component generator respects active brand Verification: Generated components use brand tokens; Color choices match brand palette; Typography follows brand
[AI Brand Context Injection] Inject brand tokens into AI prompts Verification: Brand tokens in system prompt; Color palette available to AI; Typography available to AI

[Multi-Brand Support] Support for multiple brand kit packages (platxa, custom, etc.) Verification: Any npm package following BrandKitExport interface works; @platxa/brand-kit is just one option; Custom brand kits work without special handling

[Brand Fallback Chain] Graceful fallback: brand → preset → default when loading fails Verification: If brand kit fails to load, falls back to preset; If preset not specified, falls back to default; Error logged but app continues working

[Brand Context Provider] React context for accessing brand information throughout app Verification: BrandProvider component available; useBrand hook returns current brand info; Components can react to brand changes
[Brand Overrides] brand.overrides field to override specific brand tokens Verification: Individual tokens can be overridden; Overrides merged with brand kit tokens; Type-safe override structure

[Environment-Based Config] Different brand configs per environment (dev, staging, prod) Verification: NODE_ENV respected for config selection; Environment-specific overrides supported; Clear precedence rules documented
[Config Validation] Validate config schema at build time with helpful errors Verification: Invalid config fails build; Error messages point to specific field; Suggestions for fixing provided
[Config Auto-Discovery] Auto-discover config file in project root or config/ folder Verification: Searches project root first; Falls back to config/ folder; Supports multiple file extensions
[Tailwind Preset Export] Brand kit can optionally export Tailwind v4 preset Verification: Tailwind preset is optional; If provided, follows Tailwind v4 format; Can be used directly in tailwind.config
[CSS File Paths] Brand kit can export paths to pre-built CSS files Verification: css.tokens path optional; css.themes path optional; Paths resolve correctly when imported
[Local Path Loading] Load brand kit from local file path (e.g., ./my-brand) Verification: Relative paths work (./brand); Absolute paths work; Path resolved from project root
[Caching] Cache loaded brand kits to avoid repeated imports Verification: Brand kit cached after first load; Cache invalidation on version change; Memory-efficient caching
[Version Checking] Validate brand kit version compatibility with frontend-agent Verification: Version compatibility checked; Warning for version mismatch; Minimum version enforced
[Loading States] Expose loading states (loading, loaded, error) via hooks Verification: isLoading state available; isLoaded state available; error state available
[Tree Shaking Support] Support tree shaking of unused brand kit exports Verification: Unused exports removed; ESM format for tree shaking; Side-effect free exports
[Color Format Conversion] Convert between color formats (OKLCH ↔ HSL ↔ RGB) Verification: Bidirectional conversion; Accuracy maintained; Gamut mapping for out-of-range
[Semantic Token Mapping] Map brand primitives to semantic tokens automatically Verification: Primitives mapped to semantic; Mapping rules configurable; Override individual mappings
[Component Token Generation] Generate component-specific tokens from brand colors Verification: Button tokens generated; Card tokens generated; Input tokens generated
[Contrast Ratio Validation] Validate color contrast ratios meet WCAG standards Verification: Contrast ratio calculated; WCAG AA check (4.5:1); WCAG AAA check (7:1)
[BrandProvider Component] React context provider for brand-aware components Verification: Wraps app at root level; Provides brand context to children; Handles brand loading state
[CLI Brand Init] CLI command to initialize brand configuration Verification: Interactive prompts for config; Generates frontend.config.ts; Installs required dependencies
[CLI Brand Validate] CLI command to validate brand kit structure Verification: Validates against schema; Reports missing fields; Checks color contrast
[CLI Brand Generate] CLI command to generate brand kit scaffold Verification: Generates package structure; Creates template files; Includes TypeScript types
[Migration Guide] Guide for migrating from built-in to brand kit Verification: Step-by-step instructions; Code examples; Common pitfalls listed
